productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Court Switch White Sports Shoes
description: For all you beginners of tennis, here's that iconic shoe from adidas that can shape you into a winner with ease. The Switch Court tennis shoe is a classic tough shoe that provides a timeless layout and absolute grip, allowing you to concentrate on the game with ease.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute durability and breathable comfortMeshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability and snug, comfortable FitMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised fitErgonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole that offers impact protection when hitting the ground at hard speedsadiPRENE+ inserts in the forefoot for enhanced impact protectionOutsoleNon-marking gum rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for ease of movement and enhanced durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
